evals.prompt: Add a brand glow to the selected Figma button without removing its existing effects.
evals.expected_output: Uses DROP_SHADOW glow recipe, appends to existing effects, and requires readback.

evals.prompt: Make this card glassy with background blur and bind the blur radius to a variable.
evals.expected_output: Checks fill transparency, uses BACKGROUND_BLUR, binds radius only if variable exists, and writes returned effect back.

evals.prompt: Add NOISE and GLASS effects and bind all their fields to variables.
evals.expected_output: Runtime-gates extended effects and refuses unsupported variable binding for noise/glass.
